caption: A group of people, primarily men dressed in traditional Indian white kurtas and trousers, walk outdoors past a green hedge and a white vehicle. A woman wearing a brown sari walks alongside them. The scene is framed by a news broadcast overlay featuring the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo in the top right corner and a red banner at the bottom with the text "जे. पी. नड्डा: I.N.D.I. गठबंधन चलने वाला नहीं है". The top of the screen asks, "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". Various headshots of political figures are displayed on the left and right sides of the screen with accompanying names. As the sequence progresses, the group continues walking forward. In the final frame, a large white letter "वा" partially obscures the left side of the screen, while the time "10:07 PM" and the word "MAHAWADOH" remain visible in the bottom right.
